1475667012339499106.message:
🎭 Welcome to the shadows, survivor—you've found your tribe in this brutal wasteland and we couldn't be prouder to have you stand with us. Your journey to brotherhood begins NOW. 

 📋 Head straight to our rules channel at ⁠rules and read every word with care—these guidelines are the steel spine that holds our alliance together through the darkness. 

 📸 Once you've studied the code, move to ⁠profile-screen-shot and upload a screenshot of your in-game profile so we know who we're fighting alongside. 

 👑 One of our seasoned admins will review your credentials, assign you to your rightful role, and unlock the full scope of our discord—your command center awaits. 

 ⚔️ This is where legends are forged and survivors become UNSTOPPABLE—welcome home, soldier. Let's rise together and claim what's ours.


 📝 If you need help with translation, please go to the <#1475691067457273990> channel.
1475667012339499106.title: A NEW SHADOW HAS EMERGED FROM THE DAYLIGHT.
